item.title: Transfer rumors, news: PSG inform Man City of Haaland interest
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain have asked Manchester City to let them know if Erling Haaland ever becomes available. Transfer Talk has the latest.

item.title: Liu captures elusive figure skating gold for U.S.
item.description: Alysa Liu won the first women's figure skating gold medal for the United States in 24 years at the Winter Olympics in Milan on Thursday.

item.title: Golden goal: Keller, U.S. women top Canada in OT
item.description: Megan Keller scored the golden goal in 3-on-3 overtime as the United States women's hockey team won Olympic gold by beating archrival Canada 2-1.

item.title: C's Brown not appeased by Beverly Hills' apology
item.description: The city of Beverly Hills apologized to Celtics star Jaylen Brown on Thursday over inaccuracies in a previous statement, but Brown continued to take i...

item.title: Indiana passes bill to lure Bears from Chicago
item.description: The Bears' search for a new home took a "meaningful step" forward Thursday, opening the door for the storied franchise to leave Illinois to potentiall...
